topic: The same jogger passes my window every morning, a little slower and grayer each day.
title: The Jogger Who Ages Outside My Window | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The same jogger passes my window slower and grayer each morning.
scenes.image_prompt: A blurred jogger seen through a rain streaked window at dawn, dim light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drink my coffee at this window every day at seven.
scenes.image_prompt: A coffee mug on a sill before a quiet suburban street at dawn, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
An empty sidewalk along a row of houses in pale morning fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But last week his run had become a tired shuffle.
scenes.image_prompt: A distant slow figure walking heavily on a foggy street at dawn, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
A back view of a gray haired figure on a misty sidewalk, low light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each day he is older, bent further, moving slower past me.
scenes.image_prompt: A stooped silhouette leaning forward on a quiet street, dim morning light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went outside to look closer.
scenes.image_prompt: An open front door framing a foggy empty street at dawn, deep shadow inside, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He left no footprints, and the street stayed silent.
scenes.image_prompt: A wet empty sidewalk with no tracks, faint morning mist, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning he stopped, and slowly turned toward my window.
scenes.image_prompt: A distant hunched figure facing a house window through fog, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He raised one frail arm and pointed straight at me.
scenes.image_prompt: A back lit silhouette with one arm extended on a misty street, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not opened the curtains since.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed curtain glowing faintly with morning light behind it, dim room, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tomorrow at seven, I am afraid he will not be alone.
scenes.image_prompt: Two distant gray figures standing still on a foggy sidewalk at dawn, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
